name: CETC Energy Joint-Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: CETC Energy Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells motorcycles and its engines primarily in the People's Republic of China. It offers street bikes, cub motorcycles, off-road motorcycles, scooters, cargo and passenger tricycles, special motorcycles, chopper motorcycles, and ATV quads. It also provides motorcycle engines; plastic and aspherical optical lens; general machinery components; and generators. The company sells its products primarily under the JiaLing and Traxx brands; and exports its products to approximately 90 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as China Jialing Industrial Co., Ltd. (Group) and changed its name to CETC Energy Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. in August 2019. The company was founded in 1875 and is based in Chongqing, the People's Republic of China. CETC Energy Joint-Stock Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of China South Industry Corporation.
